hardcoded_findings.finding: Contains explicit Dinamo tenant routing and must remain fallback-only.
Uses protected fields such as MOTO, CREDITO, ENGANCHE and FILTRO.
Customer field presentation contains Dinamo-like names.
Canonical field aliases are currently coupled to Dinamo-style fields.

recommendations: Implement tenant-scoped domain contracts before runtime rollout.
Enforce mandatory tools for product, price, requirements, documents and policy facts.
Expose GPT proposed vs AtendIA validated decisions in traces and frontend.
Keep legacy runner as fallback until comparative evaluation passes.
Use simulations and fixtures only before any live canary.
